3. Limit your search results to peer-reviewed or scholarly articles.
4. Review the abstracts or summaries of the articles to determine their relevance to your specific topic.

9. "AI augmentation" AND "workforce productivity" AND "human performance factors"

Combine these keywords and search phrases with the names of relevant academic databases or search engines to find relevant articles.
